receipt.title: Regulated escrow — proof receipt
receipt.plainSummary: An escrow released funds only after the buyer approved, a regulator could view the invoice, and two operators witnessed it. This receipt lets anyone re-check that outcome without trusting the Infrix node.
receipt.assuranceLabel: Locally verified (L3 / G2). Live L0 not checked; the node is never trusted.
whatVerified: The governed workflow ran exactly as written (every step bound into the sealed story).
The buyer's approval was a real Ed25519 decision bound to the artifact hash.
The outcome replays deterministically from the sealed evidence.
The proof's integrity is recomputed offline — the node asserts nothing the verifier did not confirm.
whatNotVerified: The Accumulate L0 anchor (L4) — a local run never confirms it; run on Kermit for L0 confirmation.
The witness quorum (two independent operators) — verified on Kermit with registered witnesses, deferred on a local run.
receipt.l0AnchorStatus: Not checked on this local run. On Kermit the anchor is confirmed against Accumulate L0 for L4.
receipt.witnessStatus: Deferred: a Kermit run with registered witnesses proves the two-operator quorum.
